seoTitle: South Maroota vs South Nowra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Maroota and South Nowra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Maroota vs South Nowra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Maroota and South Nowra.
heading: South Maroota vs South Nowra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Maroota, New South Wales and South Nowra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Nowra has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to South Maroota (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Maroota or South Nowra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Maroota has a flood risk score of 55/100, while South Nowra scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Maroota scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. South Nowra scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Maroota or South Nowra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Nowra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
